headline: Bank Stocks Rally Ahead Of Earnings. Why Bullishness Is Growing.
summary: Big Bank stocks should see investment banking and trading revenues exceed prior guidance, JPMorgan said Monday ahead of the group's earnings next week. The firm also raised price targets for major bank stocks like Citigroup.

headline: Wells Fargo Lifts PT on Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) – Here’s Why

headline: Wells Fargo Upholds Overweight Rating for Advanced Micro Devices (AMD)
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) is one of BlackRock’s 30 most important AI stocks right now.
